name: Your Next Blinds
tagline: Custom window blinds and shades manufactured in Texas
description: An e-commerce platform for custom window coverings with made-to-measure options, free fabric samples, and product categories including roller shades, vertical blinds, and motorized solutions. The work focused on product browsing, clear purchasing paths, and responsive presentation.

name: PartyFud
tagline: A catering marketplace for events in the UAE
description: An event catering marketplace connecting planners with verified caterers. The platform lets users plan events, browse caterers, customize menus, and manage bookings, with occasion-based browsing, caterer verification, pricing details, and customer reviews.

name: Vibhas Gahankar's Academy of Music
tagline: A website for a music academy
description: We created a clean website for Vibhas Gahankar's Academy of Music. The design helps students discover courses, review the curriculum, and get in touch without unnecessary complexity.

name: Code Vantage
tagline: A website for a software development agency
description: We designed and built Code Vantage's agency website as an animated React application. The work focused on presenting services, portfolio content, and technical capability through a fast and organized interface.

name: Sawsan Nizar Alakhras Foundation
tagline: A healthcare website and telemedicine platform for a non-profit
description: A non-profit website highlighting healthcare initiatives for vulnerable communities. The site explains the organization's booth-based model, volunteer network, and doctor partnerships, with telemedicine features for remote consultations and access in areas with limited clinic availability.

name: HomeTrack Real Estate
tagline: A real estate advisory website for Dubai property services
description: A real estate advisory website focused on property investment and service information. The site includes service descriptions, founder story, team profiles, testimonials, and podcast content in a structured, professional layout.

name: Aerial Perspectives Studios
tagline: A portfolio website for aerial imaging and surveying services
description: A professional services portfolio for UAE and Singapore-based drone operations. The site presents drone photography, videography, FPV cinematics, industrial inspections, safety standards, and a gallery of completed projects.

name: A+ Academy
tagline: A mathematics academy website for students in Israel
description: An educational platform for a mathematics academy founded by experienced educators. The site includes founder profiles, student outcomes, personalized learning programs, and an enrollment flow.

name: Taldo
tagline: A career support platform for nurses moving to Germany
description: A career support platform helping Indian nurses explore work opportunities in Germany. The site includes program information, a salary calculator, testimonials, FAQs, and a consultation booking flow.
